f1.question: How soon can I expect results?
f1.answer: The first inquiries usually arrive within 7 to 14 days after campaigns go live. Performance stabilizes and improves over 30 to 90 days as the algorithm learns and we refine targeting.

f2.question: Do you work with all industries?
f2.answer: Yes. Mohtaoua is a premium 360° digital agency in Morocco. We support SMEs, startups and enterprises in education, healthcare, e-commerce, real estate, hospitality, retail and many more.

f3.question: Is ad spend included in your fees?
f3.answer: No. Our fees cover strategy, management, and optimization. Media budget (spent directly on Meta or Google) is billed separately by the platforms and remains yours. We advise you on the optimal budget for your goals.

f4.question: Is there a minimum commitment?
f4.answer: We recommend an initial 3-month commitment—the time needed to gather enough data and reach a steady performance level. After that, contracts are non-binding and can be cancelled with 30 days' notice.

f5.question: How do you track performance?
f5.answer: Real-time dashboards (leads, conversions, ROAS, traffic, business KPIs) available 24/7. Regular check-ins and monthly results-oriented reporting.

f6.question: Do you also offer development and design?
f6.answer: Yes. Beyond marketing, we build websites, custom software, mobile apps, brand identity, photo/video and corporate events.

f7.question: Can you connect to our existing tools?
f7.answer: Absolutely. CRM, ERP, marketing tools, APIs and business platforms — we integrate your existing stack (HubSpot, Pipedrive, Shopify, WhatsApp API, etc.).

f8.question: What happens during the free audit?
f8.answer: We analyze your digital presence, acquisition channels, website, tools and processes. You leave with a clear diagnosis and a concrete action plan.
